title: Finance
summary: # Finance Tracker Monorepo: - `apps/api`: FastAPI + Postgres (Alembic migrations) - `apps/web`: Next.js web UI ## Quickstart (Windows) Prereqs: - Docker Desktop (for Postgres) - Python 3.11+ (with the `py` launcher) - Node.js LTS (includes `npm`) Run: ```powershell cd path\to\Finance .\run-dev.bat ``` URLs: - Web: `http://localhost:3000` - API: `http://localhost:8000` ## Auth Modes ### Local auth (no Supabase required) This is the default for local dev.

details.solution: # Finance Tracker Monorepo: - `apps/api`: FastAPI + Postgres (Alembic migrations) - `apps/web`: Next.js web UI ## Quickstart (Windows) Prereqs: - Docker Desktop (for Postgres) - Python 3.11+ (with the `py` launcher) - Node.js LTS (includes `npm`) Run: ```powershell cd path\to\Finance .\run-dev.bat ``` URLs: - Web: `http://localhost:3000` - API: `http://localhost:8000` ## Auth Modes ### Local auth (no Supabase required) This is the default for local dev.

title: Sprout Copy
summary: # Sprout Copy A complete, local-first web app inspired by fast-apply job tools: - Profile autofill center (single profile used for every application) - CV file upload (PDF/DOC/DOCX/TXT) - SMTP automation settings for outbound applications - Job feed with search/filter/save - One-click quick apply flow that sends real emails (CV + generated cover letter) - Visual pipeline board (drag cards across stages) - Funnel analytics and weekly activity chart - CSV export of applications ## Stack - Node.js HTTP server + `nodemailer` - Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend - JSON file persistence (`data/db.json`) ## Run 1.

details.solution: # Sprout Copy A complete, local-first web app inspired by fast-apply job tools: - Profile autofill center (single profile used for every application) - CV file upload (PDF/DOC/DOCX/TXT) - SMTP automation settings for outbound applications - Job feed with search/filter/save - One-click quick apply flow that sends real emails (CV + generated cover letter) - Visual pipeline board (drag cards across stages) - Funnel analytics and weekly activity chart - CSV export of applications ## Stack - Node.js HTTP server + `nodemailer` - Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend - JSON file persistence (`data/db.json`) ## Run 1.

title: Trading
summary: # Trading Algo This repository contains a MetaTrader 5 (MT5) **demo/paper** trading bot.

details.solution: # Trading Algo This repository contains a MetaTrader 5 (MT5) **demo/paper** trading bot.

title: Trading Algo Working
summary: # Paper Trading Bot (MT5 + IBKR, Textual TUI) Production-style **demo/paper** trading bot with: - MT5 connectivity (official `MetaTrader5` package) + auto-reconnect - IBKR connectivity via `ib_insync` (paper trading) - Dynamic symbol discovery + canonical mapping (suffix variants supported) - Multi-asset ranking → correlation-diversified **top 5** - Strategy registry + manual or ADX regime selection - Safe execution with **idempotency**, retries, and risk controls - Full persistence to SQLite (decisions/trades/errors/settings/heartbeats) - Telegram notifications to **two chat IDs** (optional) - Textual TUI: Dashboard, Trades, Decisions, Settings, Resources (CPU/RAM/Disk/Net/Temps) ## Important: MT5 on Linux The official `MetaTrader5` Python package is **Windows-native**.

details.solution: # Paper Trading Bot (MT5 + IBKR, Textual TUI) Production-style **demo/paper** trading bot with: - MT5 connectivity (official `MetaTrader5` package) + auto-reconnect - IBKR connectivity via `ib_insync` (paper trading) - Dynamic symbol discovery + canonical mapping (suffix variants supported) - Multi-asset ranking → correlation-diversified **top 5** - Strategy registry + manual or ADX regime selection - Safe execution with **idempotency**, retries, and risk controls - Full persistence to SQLite (decisions/trades/errors/settings/heartbeats) - Telegram notifications to **two chat IDs** (optional) - Textual TUI: Dashboard, Trades, Decisions, Settings, Resources (CPU/RAM/Disk/Net/Temps) ## Important: MT5 on Linux The official `MetaTrader5` Python package is **Windows-native**.
